entries.name: Roll Calculator — Boss Saves
entries.description: STR Save: Advantage 1d20+7. DEX Save: Advantage 1d20+9. CON Save: Advantage 1d20+10. INT Save: Advantage 1d20+8. WIS Save: Advantage 1d20+9. CHA Save: Advantage 1d20+15.

entries.name: Roll Calculator — Social / Casting
entries.description: Spell Save DC: 25. Spellcasting / Flesh Attack: Advantage 1d20+17. Proficient Charisma Skill: Advantage 1d20+15. Prepared Deception / Impersonation / Persuasion: 1d20+15; Silver Tongue d20 floor 10 applies. Player Improv Deception / Impersonation / Persuasion: 1d20+10; Expert Deceiver and Silver Tongue do not apply vs players.

entries.name: Advantage on All Rolls
entries.description: While Boss Presence is active, Capella rolls 2d20 and takes the higher result on attacks, saves, checks, and contested rolls unless a line says otherwise.

entries.name: Charisma Spellcasting
entries.description: Capella uses Charisma for spell save DCs, spell attacks, flesh magic, Polymorph effects, and distortion effects.

entries.name: Expert Deceiver
entries.description: Umbrella social mastery package. Grants prepared Deception / Impersonation / Persuasion a +10 expertise-style bonus. Does not apply against player characters.

entries.name: Silver Tongue
entries.description: College of Eloquence-style feature. For Deception and Persuasion, d20 rolls of 9 or lower count as 10. This is a d20 floor of 10. Does not apply against player character Insight checks.

entries.name: Arcane Mastery
entries.description: Adds +2 to spell save DCs and spell/flesh attack rolls.

entries.name: Unnatural Armor
entries.description: Base AC becomes 15 + Dexterity modifier while unarmored. With Boss DEX 18, this gives AC 19. Armored Flesh can raise this to AC 21.

entries.name: Aberrant Lich Bonus
entries.description: Adds +2 CHA and supports lich-style undead/Far Realm traits such as Soul Vessel, Far Realm Mutation, Unnatural Armor, Arcane Mastery, and Telepathy.

entries.name: Far Realm Mutation
entries.description: Explains psychic/cold/necrotic/acid resistance, poison/lightning/nonmagical weapon immunity, unstable biology, and body horror transformations.

entries.name: Soul Vessel / Far Realm Parasite
entries.description: When reduced to 0 HP, the current body collapses. Capella does not truly die unless the parasite/vessel anchor is found, contained, destroyed, or otherwise dealt with.

entries.name: Extra Attack
entries.description: When Capella takes the Attack action, she makes 2 attacks.

entries.name: Bonus Attack
entries.description: If Capella takes the Attack action on her turn, she may make 1 additional natural attack as a Bonus Action.

entries.name: Legendary Action
entries.description: Once per round, outside her turn, Capella may take 1 full Action. If used for Attack, this gives her 2 more attacks.

entries.name: Nonlethal Intent
entries.description: Capella usually avoids killing. Her attacks are meant to disable, maim, pin, terrify, transform, or humiliate rather than execute.
